questions.question:
Two hosts are connected via a packet switch with \(10^{7}\) bits per second links. Each link has a propagation delay of 20 microseconds. The switch begins forwarding a packet 35 microseconds after it receives the same. If 10000 bits of data are to be transmitted between the two hosts using a packet size of 5000 bits, the time elapsed between the transmission of the first bit of data and the reception of the last bit of the data in microseconds is____________.

(GATE CSE 2015 SET-3)
questions.explanation: Click here for detail solution by gateoverflow

questions.question:

The network is to be used to its full capacity. Assume that processing delays at nodes are negligible. Then, the minimum size in bits of the sequence number field has to be ___________.

questions.question:
Which one of the following statements is NOT correct about HTTP cookies?

(GATE CSE 2015 SET-2)
options:
A.

A cookie is a piece of code that has the potential to compromise the security of an Internet user

B.

A cookie gains entry to the user's work area through an HTTP header

C.

A cookie has an expiry date and time

D.

Cookies can be used to track the browsing pattern of a user at a particular site
questions.correct_answer:
A.

A cookie is a piece of code that has the potential to compromise the security of an Internet user
